name: autoresearch
script_text: This repo lets AI agents automatically research and improve a single-GPU natural language model. The agents modify the training code, run 5-minute experiments, and track their progress - all without human intervention. The core idea is to provide a small but realistic training setup and let autonomous agents iteratively optimize the model, architecture, and hyperparameters. This hands-off approach aims to accelerate the pace of AI research by leveraging the agents' ability to explore the search space more efficiently than humans. The training code is based on the open-source nanochat project, giving you a simplified but practical starting point. If you're interested in the frontier of autonomous AI research, check out this project to see how AI can drive its own progress.

name: goose-skills
script_text:
The goose-skills library provides a collection of pre-built skills for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. These skills cover a wide range of use cases, from sales and marketing to competitive intelligence and SEO. 

The installation process is straightforward, using a simple command to install the desired skill. Each skill is designed to be self-contained and easy to integrate into your existing workflows. 

The library includes a variety of capabilities, such as ad campaign analysis, competitor research, and messaging testing. It also offers composite skills that combine multiple capabilities into end-to-end workflows, streamlining your research and decision-making processes.

Whether you're a sales professional, a marketing analyst, or a growth hacker, the goose-skills library can help you automate and optimize your workflows, giving you more time to focus on high-impact tasks.

name: hermes-agent
script_text:
Here's a 160-word engineering-focused video script for the Hermes Agent project:

Hermes Agent is a self-improving AI assistant built by Nous Research. Unlike traditional AI agents, Hermes has a closed learning loop - it creates and improves its own skills based on usage, retains knowledge across sessions, and builds a deepening model of the user.

Hermes can run on a $5 VPS, GPU clusters, or serverless infrastructure, and integrates with popular messaging platforms like Telegram, Discord, and Slack. It supports a wide range of language models, including Nous Portal, OpenRouter, and OpenAI, allowing you to switch between them seamlessly.

Hermes features a real terminal interface with multiline editing, command autocomplete, and streaming output. It can also schedule automated tasks, delegate work to isolated subagents, and access a variety of tools via RPC calls. 

Whether you're a developer, researcher, or knowledge worker, Hermes Agent is designed to grow alongside you, providing a versatile and adaptable AI assistant to handle your evolving needs.

name: RCLI
script_text: Talk to your Mac, query your docs, no cloud required. RCLI is an on-device voice AI for macOS, powered by a complete speech-to-text, language model, text-to-speech, and computer vision pipeline running natively on Apple Silicon. Leveraging a proprietary GPU inference engine called MetalRT, RCLI delivers 40 macOS actions via voice, local retrieval and question-answering over your documents, and sub-200ms end-to-end latency - all without relying on the cloud or any external API keys. This on-device approach ensures your data stays private and your workflows remain uninterrupted. Whether you need to control apps, access information, or analyze your screen and camera, RCLI puts the power of voice AI right at your fingertips.

name: page-agent
script_text:
Page Agent is a JavaScript in-page GUI agent that lets you control web interfaces with natural language. It provides text-based DOM manipulation without the need for browser extensions, Python scripts, or headless browsers. 

The key features include easy integration, where you can simply include a script tag to get started. Page Agent also supports bringing your own language models, making it a flexible solution for various use cases.

An optional Chrome extension is available for multi-page tasks, and there's also an MCP Server (Beta) to control the agent from outside the web page. 

Use cases include building SaaS AI copilots, smart form filling for enterprise systems, and making web apps accessible through natural language interactions. Page Agent aims to bring the power of language models to web automation, enhancing productivity and accessibility.

name: cutefolio
script_text:
Cutefolio is a project that helps you build portfolios and linkfolios with a delightful aesthetic. It offers a range of customizable templates, allowing you to personalize your online presence with your own fonts, colors, and layout. The platform also provides per-profile analytics, tracking page views, link clicks, visitor locations, and more. 

Cutefolio's technical implementation is noteworthy, leveraging the Bun runtime, Next.js 16, and a robust tech stack including Tailwind CSS, Drizzle ORM, and NextAuth for authentication. The project also integrates with Polar for seamless billing, enabling Pro and Ultra plans with features like custom domains and advanced analytics.

Whether you're an individual looking to showcase your work or a brand seeking a visually appealing online presence, Cutefolio offers a comprehensive solution to create truly unique and engaging portfolios and linkfolios.

name: openui
script_text:
OpenUI is a full-stack Generative UI framework that introduces a compact streaming-first language for model-generated UI. Instead of treating model output as only text, OpenUI allows you to define components, generate prompt instructions from your component library, and render structured UI as the model streams.

The core of OpenUI is the OpenUI Lang - a compact language designed for efficient streaming of structured UI. OpenUI also provides built-in component libraries for charts, forms, tables, and layouts, enabling you to seamlessly integrate them into your AI-generated user interfaces.

One of the key features is the ability to generate model instructions directly from the components you allow, ensuring that the output aligns with your desired UI structure. The streaming renderer then parses and renders the model output progressively in React as tokens arrive, providing a smooth and responsive user experience.

OpenUI is a powerful tool for building AI-driven interactive applications, from assistants to copilots, with a focus on efficient and structured UI generation.

name: dolt
script_text:
Dolt is Git for Data. It's a SQL database that you can version control just like a Git repository. Connect to Dolt like any MySQL database and use familiar Git commands to fork, clone, branch, merge, push, and pull. 

Dolt versions your tables, not just files. It's like Git and MySQL had a baby. Use Dolt to import CSV files, commit changes, and merge your team's updates. All the Git commands you know work the same for Dolt.

We also built DoltHub, a place to share Dolt databases. You can host your own DoltHub or use our Hosted Dolt service. For Postgres fans, try Doltgres, our Postgres-compatible version of Dolt.

Dolt is a generally useful tool, but a great use case is setting it up as a replica of your existing MySQL database using standard binlog replication. Every write becomes a Dolt commit, giving you the benefits of version control.

name: kestra
script_text:
Kestra is an event-driven orchestration platform that simplifies both scheduled and event-driven workflows. By applying Infrastructure as Code principles, Kestra enables you to declaratively define and manage your mission-critical applications, data pipelines, and microservices. 

The platform's unique event-driven architecture ensures reliable, scalable, and fault-tolerant execution of complex workflows. Kestra's intuitive user interface and powerful CLI make it easy to design, deploy, and monitor your orchestration tasks.

With Kestra, you can focus on your core business logic while the platform handles the underlying infrastructure and workflow management. Kestra is an ideal solution for enterprises and teams that require a robust, flexible, and scalable orchestration platform for their mission-critical applications.

name: sql-crack
script_text:
SQL Crack is a VS Code extension that transforms SQL queries into interactive visual flow diagrams. It provides an intuitive way to understand complex queries, track data lineage, and identify optimization opportunities.

The extension supports multiple SQL dialects and offers advanced features like execution flow visualization, column lineage tracing, CTE and subquery expansion, and performance analysis. The clean, streamlined interface allows you to quickly navigate and explore your queries, with a legend bar and command palette for quick access.

Key capabilities include side-by-side query comparison, complexity scoring, and fan-out analysis - empowering you to write more efficient and maintainable SQL code. Whether you're a data analyst, developer, or DBA, SQL Crack is a powerful tool to enhance your SQL workflow and gain deeper insights into your data.

name: k8s-cleaner
script_text:
Cleaner is a Kubernetes controller that identifies and removes unused or unhealthy resources, helping maintain a streamlined and efficient Kubernetes cluster. It provides flexible scheduling, label-based filtering, and custom Lua-based selection criteria. Cleaner can remove or update resources and send notifications via Slack, Webex, Discord, Teams, Telegram, and SMTP.

The controller's unique implementation allows it to handle any Kubernetes resource type, including custom resources. It can identify unhealthy resources and automate cluster operations, ensuring your Kubernetes environment remains lean and optimized. 

Cleaner is designed to be a powerful tool for Kubernetes administrators, helping them maintain a clean and efficient cluster by automating the identification and removal of stale or orphaned resources.

name: plannotator
script_text:
Introducing Plannotator - an interactive plan and code review tool for AI coding agents. Plannotator lets you visually annotate agent plans and code diffs, share feedback with your team, and seamlessly integrate with popular AI coding platforms like Claude Code, OpenCode, Pi, and Codex.

With Plannotator, you can mark up and refine agent plans, see what's changed between plan iterations, and review their code diffs - all in a single, intuitive interface. Share your annotations and feedback with teammates to collaborate on plan optimization and code quality.

Plannotator offers end-to-end encrypted sharing, with zero-knowledge storage, ensuring your plans and code reviews remain secure. This engineering-focused tool empowers you to streamline your AI-assisted development workflows and drive better outcomes for your projects.

name: agent-browser-protocol
script_text:
Introducing agent-browser-protocol: deterministic browser automation that works seamlessly with Claude, Codex, and OpenCode. This open-source project provides a reliable and efficient way to control the Chromium web browser programmatically.

Unlike traditional browser automation tools, agent-browser-protocol offers a unique, stateful approach, ensuring consistent and predictable behavior across multiple sessions. This makes it an ideal choice for tasks like web scraping, testing, and integration with AI-driven workflows.

The project's integration with popular language models like Claude and Codex allows developers to harness the power of machine learning for advanced browser automation scenarios. Whether you're automating complex web interactions or building intelligent assistants, agent-browser-protocol is a powerful tool to have in your arsenal.

name: k8s-unix-system
script_text:
Introducing k8s-unix-system, a 3D Kubernetes resource viewer inspired by the iconic File System Navigator from Jurassic Park. Fly through your cluster like it's 1993, with namespaces rendered as raised platforms and pods as 3D blocks. This tool leverages the Kubernetes watch API to provide live updates, allowing you to visualize the state of your cluster in real-time.

Explore your Kubernetes resources in a unique and engaging way. Hover over pods and nodes to see detailed information, and use intuitive controls to navigate the 3D environment. Whether you're a DevOps engineer, a developer, or just curious about Kubernetes, k8s-unix-system offers a fresh perspective on managing your containerized workloads.

name: terrapod
script_text:
Terrapod is an open-source platform that replaces Terraform Enterprise. It provides the collaboration, governance, and state management features you need, while allowing you to use Terraform or ToFu as the execution backend.

Terrapod is designed for API compatibility with the HCP Terraform/TFE V2 API, so you can use your existing tools and integrations with minimal changes. It orchestrates the underlying infrastructure, handling tasks like remote state management, access control, and run orchestration.

The key features include workspaces, remote execution, VCS integration, variable management, and audit logging. Terrapod also offers a private module and provider registry, allowing you to securely share your infrastructure code within your organization.

Terrapod is a flexible, self-hosted alternative to Terraform Enterprise, empowering teams to manage their infrastructure as code with enhanced collaboration and governance.
